evals.prompt: Review the requirements in .project-requirements/metadata.md and tell me if they're good enough to start development
evals.expected_output: Should read the file, produce a structured assessment with verdict/strengths/gaps, ask 3-5 targeted questions, and propose improvements. Should save an improved REQUIREMENTS.md.

evals.prompt: I wrote some requirements for our new notification system but I'm not sure if I covered everything. Can you check them? They're in docs/notifications-requirements.md
evals.expected_output: Should read the specified file, evaluate completeness and rigor, identify missing sections like error handling or rollout plan, ask targeted questions, and generate an improved REQUIREMENTS.md.

evals.prompt:
Improve these requirements:

## User Authentication

We need to add login and signup to the app. Users should be able to log in with email and password. We also want social login.
evals.expected_output: Should flag the requirements as incomplete (🔴), identify critical gaps (no scope boundaries, no error handling, no security details, no acceptance criteria), ask 3-5 questions about specifics (which social providers, password policy, session management), and propose a comprehensive improved version saved to REQUIREMENTS.md.
